description: Deterministic ingestion corpus. Each document is ingested through the real IngestionPipeline with a StubLlmClient that returns the document's canned extraction (keyed by title) for the 'knowledge_extraction' call, plus a deterministic 'contradiction_judgement' for supersession/contradiction. The HashEmbedder provides deterministic vectors. 'expected' captures the ground-truth metrics so the benchmark is comparable across commits. Documents are ingested in array order; later documents exercise dedup, temporal supersession, and contradiction detection against earlier state.

documents.title: History notes
documents.text: Notes about Ada Lovelace and the Analytical Engine. Ada collaborated with Charles Babbage.

documents.title: Engineer profile
documents.text: Grace Hopper joined the lab. She lives in Boston as of 2021. She works on the COBOL compiler.
documents.note: Introduces a temporal claim (validFrom) used to test temporal handling and as the prior fact for supersession.

observations.sourceQuote: She lives in Boston as of 2021.

documents.title: Engineer profile update
documents.text: Update: Grace Hopper moved to Seattle in 2023.
documents.note: Temporal supersession: the new location update should supersede the prior Boston fact via detectContradictions.

observations.sourceQuote: Grace Hopper moved to Seattle in 2023.

documents.title: Conflicting report
documents.text: A report claims Grace Hopper never lived in Seattle and remained in Boston the whole time.
documents.note: Genuine contradiction (not a clean update): should be recorded for human review, not silently superseded.

observations.claim: Grace Hopper never lived in Seattle.
observations.sourceQuote: Grace Hopper never lived in Seattle and remained in Boston.
